title: Enhanced Email Security
description: Deploy advanced email security with AI-based phishing detection, implement DMARC/DKIM/SPF, enhance user awareness training program
costBenefit: ROI 3.2x based on €480K average ransomware cost avoided annually
acceptanceCriteria: Phishing click rate <5%, email threat block rate >99%

title: Vulnerability Management Enhancement
description: Implement automated patch management, reduce patch window to 7 days for critical CVEs, deploy virtual patching capability
costBenefit: Reduces exploitation risk by 80%. Payback in 8 months based on incident cost avoidance
acceptanceCriteria: Critical patches within 7 days, 95% patch coverage

title: Customer Data Protection Program
description: Implement field-level encryption, deploy WAF with custom rules, enhance SAST/DAST coverage, implement data masking
costBenefit: GDPR fine avoidance potential €5M+. Customer trust preservation invaluable
acceptanceCriteria: Zero SQLi vulnerabilities in pentests, encryption at rest for all PII

title: Insider Threat Program
description: Implement UEBA, deploy enhanced DLP, establish access governance program, improve offboarding process
costBenefit: Reduces insider risk by 60%. Compliance with data protection requirements
acceptanceCriteria: DLP coverage 100%, access reviews 100% on time

title: Zero Trust Authentication
description: Complete MFA rollout, implement passwordless authentication for high-risk systems, deploy adaptive authentication
costBenefit: Eliminates 99% of credential stuffing attacks. Industry best practice
acceptanceCriteria: 100% MFA coverage, zero credential stuffing success

title: Privileged Access Management
description: Deploy full PAM solution, implement just-in-time access, session recording, credential vaulting
costBenefit: Privileged accounts are primary APT target. Critical control gap
acceptanceCriteria: All admin access via PAM, session recording 100%

title: Third-Party Risk Program Enhancement
description: Implement continuous vendor monitoring, enhance due diligence process, establish vendor security requirements
costBenefit: DORA compliance requirement. Reduces concentration and security risk
acceptanceCriteria: All critical vendors SOC2 certified, continuous monitoring active

title: Business Continuity Enhancement
description: Upgrade DR site to active-active, implement automated failover, increase DR testing frequency
costBenefit: RTO reduction from 4 hours to 1 hour. Revenue protection during outages
acceptanceCriteria: RTO <1 hour, quarterly DR tests passing

title: Cloud Security Posture Management
description: Deploy CSPM tooling, implement infrastructure as code scanning, establish cloud security guardrails
costBenefit: Prevents data exposure incidents. Average cloud breach cost €4.5M
acceptanceCriteria: Zero public S3 buckets, 100% resource compliance

title: Insider Risk Management
description: Implement behavioral analytics, enhance access certification, improve separation of duties
costBenefit: Comprehensive insider threat detection. Regulatory expectation
acceptanceCriteria: UEBA alerts reviewed within 4 hours, quarterly access reviews

title: DDoS Protection Enhancement
description: Deploy cloud-based DDoS mitigation, implement rate limiting, enhance capacity planning
costBenefit: Customer portal availability critical. SLA protection

title: Compliance Management Program
description: Implement GRC platform, automate compliance evidence, establish continuous monitoring
costBenefit: NIS2 and DORA compliance. Reduces audit preparation effort 60%
acceptanceCriteria: Zero material audit findings, automated evidence for 80% controls
